generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our values from those who would exploit our openness. Remember when foreign actors manipulated our last election? Imagine if we'd had the tools to detect and deter that ourselves. Our allies expect us to carry our weight, but we can't if we're vulnerable to bad actors. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
